description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on workflow dispatch, push to tags matching v*, and pull requests to the main branch. The workflow should have environment variables OMP_NUM_THREADS set to 10 and MKL_THREADING_LAYER set to GNU. It should have multiple jobs for different environments and build configurations, including format, Linux x86_64 with cmake, Linux x86_64 with AVX2 and AVX512, Linux x86_64 with GPU and ROCm, Linux arm64 with SVE, and various conda builds for Linux, Windows, and OSX.
